stemHtml: From the following statements, choose the one which best describes a Rosemount Ice Detector System…

options.a: The system consists of a vibrating detector which can be heated.
options.b: The system consists of a small heated pipe with several holes.
options.c: The system consists of heated probe and a built-in floodlight.
options.d: The system consists of a temperature probe and moisture detector controller which in turn incorporates two heated sensors.
